en: "No one whose testicles are crushed or whose male organ is cut off shall enter the assembly of the LORD.
zh: “睾丸受傷的，或生殖器被割除的，不可進耶和華的會。

en: "No one born of a forbidden union may enter the assembly of the LORD. Even to the tenth generation, none of his descendants may enter the assembly of the LORD.
zh: 私生子不可進耶和華的會；他的後代直到第十代，也不可進耶和華的會。

en: "No Ammonite or Moabite may enter the assembly of the LORD. Even to the tenth generation, none of them may enter the assembly of the LORD forever,
zh: 亞捫人或摩押人不可進耶和華的會；他們的後代直到第十代，也永遠不可進耶和華的會。

en: because they did not meet you with bread and with water on the way, when you came out of Egypt, and because they hired against you Balaam the son of Beor from Pethor of Mesopotamia, to curse you.
zh: 因為你們出埃及的時候，他們沒有拿食物和水在路上迎接你們，又因為他們從兩河之間的亞蘭的毘奪雇了比珥的兒子巴蘭，來攻擊你，咒詛你。

en: But the LORD your God would not listen to Balaam; instead the LORD your God turned the curse into a blessing for you, because the LORD your God loved you.
zh: 但耶和華你的 神不願聽從巴蘭；耶和華你的 神使咒詛的話變為你的祝福，因為耶和華你的 神愛你。

en: You shall not seek their peace or their prosperity all your days forever.
zh: 你一生一世永不可尋求他們的平安和他們的福樂。

en: "You shall not abhor an Edomite, for he is your brother. You shall not abhor an Egyptian, because you were a sojourner in his land.
zh: “你不可厭惡以東人，因為他是你的兄弟；不可厭惡埃及人，因為你在他的地上作過寄居的。

en: Children born to them in the third generation may enter the assembly of the LORD.
zh: 他們所生的子孫到了第三代，就可以進耶和華的會。

en: "When you are encamped against your enemies, then you shall keep yourself from every evil thing.
zh: “你出兵安營攻打仇敵的時候，要謹守自己，遠避一切惡事。

en: "If any man among you becomes unclean because of a nocturnal emission, then he shall go outside the camp. He shall not come inside the camp,
zh: “如果你們中間有人因為夜間偶然夢遺而不潔淨，就要出到營外去，不可進入營中。

en: but when evening comes, he shall bathe himself in water, and as the sun sets, he may come inside the camp.
zh: 到了黃昏的時候，他要用水洗澡；日落了，他才可以進入營中。

en: "You shall have a place outside the camp, and you shall go out to it.
zh: 你在營外要有廁所，你可以出到那裡去便溺。

en: And you shall have a trowel with your tools, and when you sit down outside, you shall dig a hole with it and turn back and cover up your excrement.
zh: 在你的器械中，要有一把鍬；你在外面便溺以後，可以用來鏟土，轉身把糞便掩蓋。

en: Because the LORD your God walks in the midst of your camp, to deliver you and to give up your enemies before you, therefore your camp must be holy, so that he may not see anything indecent among you and turn away from you.
zh: 因為耶和華你的 神常在你的營中行走，要拯救你，要把你的仇敵交在你的面前；所以你的營要聖潔，免得他看見你那裡有污穢的東西，就離開你。

en: "You shall not give up to his master a slave who has escaped from his master to you.
zh: “如果一個奴僕離開了他的主人，逃到你那裡來，你不可把他送交他的主人。

en: He shall dwell with you, in your midst, in the place that he shall choose within one of your towns, wherever it suits him. You shall not wrong him.
zh: 他要在你中間和你同住，住在他自己選擇的地方，住在他喜歡的城市，你不可欺負他。

en: "None of the daughters of Israel shall be a cult prostitute, and none of the sons of Israel shall be a cult prostitute.
zh: “以色列的女子中不可有廟妓，以色列的男子中不可有男廟妓。

en: You shall not bring the fee of a prostitute or the wages of a dog into the house of the LORD your God in payment for any vow, for both of these are an abomination to the LORD your God.
zh: 妓女所得的酬金，或男妓所得的代價，你不可帶入耶和華你的 神的殿裡還任何的願，因為這兩樣都是耶和華你的 神厭惡的。

en: "You shall not charge interest on loans to your brother, interest on money, interest on food, interest on anything that is lent for interest.
zh: 你借給你兄弟的銀錢、食物，或是任何可以生利的東西，都不可取利。

en: You may charge a foreigner interest, but you may not charge your brother interest, that the LORD your God may bless you in all that you undertake in the land that you are entering to take possession of it.
zh: 借給外族人，你倒可以取利；只是借給你的兄弟，你就不可取利；好使耶和華你的 神，在你要去得為業的地上，和你手裡所辦的一切事上，賜福給你。

en: "If you make a vow to the LORD your God, you shall not delay fulfilling it, for the LORD your God will surely require it of you, and you will be guilty of sin.
zh: “如果你向耶和華你的 神許了願，就不可遲延還願，因為耶和華你的 神必向你追討，那時你就有罪了。

en: But if you refrain from vowing, you will not be guilty of sin.
zh: 如果你不許願，你倒沒有罪。

en: You shall be careful to do what has passed your lips, for you have voluntarily vowed to the LORD your God what you have promised with your mouth.
zh: 你嘴裡說出來的，你要謹守；你親口應許的甘心祭，就是你向耶和華你的 神許的願，你要實行。

en: "If you go into your neighbor's vineyard, you may eat your fill of grapes, as many as you wish, but you shall not put any in your bag.
zh: “你進了你鄰舍的葡萄園，你可以隨意吃飽葡萄，只是不可裝在你的器皿裡。

en: If you go into your neighbor's standing grain, you may pluck the ears with your hand, but you shall not put a sickle to your neighbor's standing grain.
zh: 你進了你鄰舍的麥田，你可以用手摘麥穗，只是不可在你鄰舍的麥田裡揮動鐮刀。”
